bug.description: semaphore or mutex not released on error path causing eventual resource starvation

prompt:
There is a semaphore or mutex not released on error path causing eventual resource starvation downstream of function nrf52_bringup in the boards/arm/nrf52 subsystem.
The function is located at boards/arm/nrf52/nrf9160-dk-nrf52/src/nrf52_bringup.c:58.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
